title: Dropping default value definitions from a table does not work as expected
poc: CREATE TABLE def_test (c1 INTEGER DEFAULT 5, c2 TEXT DEFAULT 'initial_default');
ALTER TABLE def_test ALTER COLUMN c1 DROP DEFAULT;
ALTER TABLE def_test ALTER COLUMN c2 DROP DEFAULT;
key_bug_features: Dropping default values from table columns fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT 'unknown', age INTEGER DEFAULT 18, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
ALTER TABLE test_table ALTER COLUMN name DROP DEFAULT;
ALTER TABLE test_table ALTER COLUMN age DROP DEFAULT;
